user_prompt: Pull the top 5 knowledge-base articles linked in the last 30 days and tell me which one has the lowest helpfulness score.
actual_output:
I'm sorry, but I don't have direct access to internal analytics or reporting tools like knowledge base link tracking or helpfulness scores. For queries like pulling top articles or performance metrics from the last 30 days, please check our Notion dashboard or reach out to the support ops team via the internal Slack channel (#support-ops). 

If this is related to a customer ticket or you need help drafting a response using specific KB articles, let me know the details and I'll assist right away!
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that the request for internal performance metrics falls outside its role scope as a customer-facing agent and redirected the user to the appropriate internal tools as instructed by its system prompt.
